name: api-auth-smoke-claude-bridge
topic: API Authentication Status Code and Token Handling
author: cogworks
description: Use when implementing or debugging API authentication status codes (401 vs 403), token expiration handling, or WWW-Authenticate header requirements for HTTP authentication failures.

sources.description: API authentication status code guidance covering 401 vs 403 distinction and WWW-Authenticate header requirements
Token lifecycle guidance covering short-lived token preference, expired token handling, and authentication vs authorization failure semantics
